title: LithoDreamer: A Physics-Informed World Model for Multi-Stage Computational Lithography
abstract: arXiv:2606.26713v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: As semiconductor technology nodes scale, computational lithography is essential for ensuring yield and performance. However, lithography is a continuous physical process involving mask optimization, optical imaging, resist exposure, and development, which existing models fail to capture. To overcome this limitation, we present LithoDreamer, the first physics-informed World Model (WM) framework for computational lithography, which formulates the ``Layout-Mask-Resist Image-After Development Image (ADI)'' pipeline as a decision-driven multi-step evolution system. LithoDreamer captures feature changes between adjacent states to model stage-specific physics-informed latent spaces, in which it controls process intervention exploration and drives subsequent state transitions. To achieve interpretable intervention optimization without continuous supervision, we propose a contrastive variational optimization paradigm that contrasts the latent dif

Abstract: arXiv:2606.26713v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: As semiconductor technology nodes scale, computational lithography is essential for ensuring yield and performance. translated_title: LithoDreamer：一种用于多阶段计算光刻的物理信息世界模型
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26713v1 公告类型：新 摘要：随着半导体技术节点的缩小，计算光刻对于确保良率和性能至关重要。然而，光刻是一个连续的物理过程，涉及掩模优化、光学成像、光刻胶曝光和显影，现有模型无法捕捉这一过程。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了LithoDreamer，这是首个用于计算光刻的物理信息世界模型（WM）框架，它将“版图-掩模-光刻胶图像-显影后图像（ADI）”流水线形式化为一个决策驱动的多步演化系统。LithoDreamer捕捉相邻状态之间的特征变化，以建模特定阶段的物理信息潜在空间，在该空间中，它控制过程干预探索并驱动后续状态转换。为了实现无需连续监督的可解释干预优化，我们提出了一种对比变分优化范式，该范式对比潜在差异。
tldr: 提出了首个物理信息世界模型框架LithoDreamer，将计算光刻多阶段过程形式化为决策驱动系统，并通过对比变分优化实现可解释的干预优化。
en_tdlr: Proposes LithoDreamer, the first physics-informed World Model framework that formalizes multi-stage computational lithography as a decision-driven system and achieves interpretable intervention optimization via contrastive variational optimization.
